channel.title: Sample Defense Feed
channel.description: A deterministic sample feed used for demos and tests.

item.title: Pentagon Expands Artificial Intelligence Program with Anduril
item.description: The Pentagon announced a major expansion of its AI work.
item.content:encoded: The Pentagon announced a major expansion of its Artificial Intelligence program on Monday, awarding new work to Anduril Industries. Leaders at the Department of Defense said the initiative will accelerate autonomous drone development across the United States. DARPA will help fund the research.

item.title: Ukraine Receives HIMARS Systems as Russia Tensions Rise
item.description: Ukraine received additional HIMARS launchers this week as tensions with Russia intensified. NATO members pledged further support, and the United States coordinated the delivery.

item.title: Lockheed Martin Wins F-35 Contract from U.S. Air Force
item.description: Lockheed Martin secured a new F-35 contract from the U.S. Air Force. The Pentagon valued the multi-year deal at billions of dollars. Boeing also competed for related sustainment work.

item.title: China Accelerates Hypersonic Weapons Testing Near Taiwan
item.description: China expanded Hypersonic Weapons testing near Taiwan this month. The People's Liberation Army conducted large exercises. Analysts at the Pentagon monitored the activity closely.
